# EgreedAI

> Africa-first AI assistant built in Kigali, Rwanda by Egreed Technology LTD. Speaks English, French and Kinyarwanda with authentic African and Rwandan context.

EgreedAI is a multilingual chat assistant owned and operated by Egreed Technology LTD. Founder & CEO: Brayan Bayishime Shema. The assistant is tuned for African users — Rwandan history, East African business, Kinyarwanda language nuance, and practical everyday help.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Chat with EgreedAI
- [Knowledge Base](/knowledge-base): African & Rwandan reference material
- [Sign in](/auth): User authentication

## About the company
- Name: Egreed Technology LTD (EgreedTech)
- HQ: KN 4 Ave, Gasabo, Kigali, Rwanda
- Founded: 4 May 2026 (registered with RDB)
- Services: School management systems, web & software development, cloud hosting, AI/ML, cybersecurity, IT consulting, computer training
- Contact: egreedtechnology@gmail.com — WhatsApp +250 795 822 290
- Website: https://egreedtech.org
